name: Malware as a Service Hash IOC in Events
notes:
This rule triggers when an IOC (File Hash) related to MaaS (i.e: Emotet Trojan and Trickbot Trojan) is observed.

Note: The Malware as a Service_SHA1, Malware as a Service_SHA256, Malware as a Service_MD5 have been prepopulated. Tune these Reference Sets with relevant IOC.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
when the event matches "MD5 Hash" is NOT NULL OR "SHA256 Hash" is NOT null OR "SHA1 Hash"is NOT NULL AQL filter query

when the event matches REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Malware as a Service_SHA256', "SHA256 Hash") OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Malware as a Service_MD5', "MD5 Hash") OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Malware as a Service_SHA1', "SHA1 Hash") AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Malware as a Service Hash IOC in Events on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
AND when the event matches "MD5 Hash" is NOT NULL OR  "SHA256 Hash" is NOT null OR  "SHA1 Hash"is NOT NULL AQL filter query

AND when the event matches REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Malware as a Service_SHA256', "SHA256 Hash") OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Malware as a Service_MD5', "MD5 Hash") OR REFERENCESETCONTAINS('Malware as a Service_SHA1', "SHA1 Hash") AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Malware as a Service Hash IOC Detected
Event description: This rule triggers when an IOC (File Hash) related to MaaS (i.e: Emotet Trojan and Trickbot Trojan) is observed.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Machine Identifier (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
